author: 0xpetersatoshi
body:
Adds the following OpenRouter models:
- Claude 4 Sonnet
- Claude 4 Opus
- Gemini 2.5 Flash 05-20 (thinking)

Additionally adds Gemini 2.5 Flash 04-17 (thinking) (this is the latest public version available directly from the Google Gemini API) to the Gemini models list and updates Gemini 2.5 flash to the 05-20 version.
title: feat(models): add latest openrouter and gemini models
